assets.exposome/exposome.json: national modifiable risk factors + composite PAF (~200 countries): NCD-RisC (BP/diabetes/BMI) + WHO GHO (smoking/inactivity) + Taiwan NHIS × Livingston 2024 RRs
assets.mci/mci-national.json: MCI prevalence — Bai 2022 WB-region baseline + national values (cloud deep-research, plausible 3-40%); modelled estimate
assets.scd/scd-national.json: SCD prevalence — national self-report values (~38 countries, cloud deep-research); heterogeneous, indicative only, not comparable
assets.geo/world-globe.geojson: Natural Earth admin-0 (public domain) + national PM2.5 (ACAG V6.GL.03, CC BY 4.0) + composite PAF (Livingston 2024) + 65+ share (World Bank/UN, partial seed) — for the globe view
assets.data-provenance.json: data-coverage / source-provenance ledger per country × data type (national + sub-national source, year, status) — see docs/side-projects/dementia-exposome/data-sourcing-plan.md
